name: Ransomware Decryption Instructions Created
notes: This rule triggers when a decryption instruction filename is found on a machine. It is typical for ransomware to create a decryption instruction file to provide users with instructions on how to pay the ransom to recover their files. This particular file is often named with common terms such as: decrypt, recover, instructions, how to, etc..
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Operating System
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.File Created
when the event matches Filename (custom) is not N/A

when the event matches LOWER("File Extension") MATCHES '.*?(where_my_files|how_to_(recover_data|decrypt)|contact_here_to_recover_your_files)' OR LOWER("Filename") MATCHES '(decrypt-files|[a-z0-9]{5,12}-readme|readme_for_decrypt)\.txt' OR (LOWER("Filename") MATCHES '.*?(decrypt|ryukreadme).*' AND LOWER("File Extension") IN ('txt','html')) AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Ransomware Decryption Instructions Created on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Operating System
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.File Created
AND when the event matches Filename (custom) is not N/A

AND when the event matches LOWER("File Extension") MATCHES '.*?(where_my_files|how_to_(recover_data|decrypt)|contact_here_to_recover_your_files)' OR  LOWER("Filename") MATCHES '(decrypt-files|[a-z0-9]{5,12}-readme|readme_for_decrypt)\.txt' OR  (LOWER("Filename") MATCHES '.*?(decrypt|ryukreadme).*' AND LOWER("File Extension") IN ('txt','html')) AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Ransomware Decryption Instructions File Created
Event description: A decryption instruction file has been created on a machine.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Machine Identifier (custom)
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
